narrative:
Precinct Norwalk Twp North (precinct in Huron County) has 933 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
